## [03:03 - 05:08]

some really good content, and then asked them to opt in for some more cool bonus content. Because basically that old list, your open rates and your click rates are not going to be great. So you're just trying to migrate some of those people over to your new list. And then your new list will be warmer. The open rates will be better. The click rates will be better. And that will actually make your delivery rates better. So I know it could be getting a little complicated for a few folks, but just in general, you want to move people to a new list. And so what you do is you give them some good content, and then you promise them some even more cool content. It doesn't have to be some amazing. It's not like you're giving them some amazing course. It could just be a quick video. It could be a quick PDF download or something like that. Have them opt into the new list. So set up a new list, have them opt into that list. Then remember, your new list and your old list are very, very different lists. Your old list is this old, cold list. The new list is the people that have migrated over and stuck with you. And so you want to, you want to, best case scenario, the people that have moved to your new list, take them off your old list. So now they're just on your new list. So unsubscribe them from the old list. And then every now and then you can send your old list, another email, tell them about some more cool content, and try to get them to move over. So like your first email to your old list, there's not going to be that many people opening it or clicking on it, but you'll move some of the people over. And then a week later, you can mail them again and you'll get some more people to move over. And a week after that, you can mail them again, the old list, and get them to move over to your new list. And gradually over time, you're not, don't think, you know, if you've had a list that you let go cold for six months or whatever, don't think you're going to get the majority of those people moving over. You're going to get a very small percentage of them. But it is going to be a very engaged, very strong percentage. So this is worth doing. And it's really that simple. This is how you warm a cold list.
